name: Georgia EPD Licensed Asbestos Abatement Contractors
updateFrequency: irregular; the official roster page warns that its lists are not updated on a regular basis
licenseTypesIncluded: Georgia-licensed asbestos abatement contractor firms listed by EPD
knownExclusions: EPD does not license asbestos inspectors, although inspectors must hold current approved training.
The official roster page warns that lists are not updated regularly and instructs users to request proof of a current license.
Training providers, inspectors, project notifications, local permits, and non-asbestos contractor credentials are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Retrieve the small official roster manually and responsibly; do not infer current status from an old PDF without direct confirmation.
publicRecordsNotes: EPD publishes an informational PDF roster and explicitly cautions that it is not updated regularly. Absence or presence in a downloaded roster is not conclusive current-license proof.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The official page links a dated PDF roster of licensed asbestos abatement contractors. Its changing file URL, field shape, freshness, privacy posture, and redistribution terms require review before adapter support.
researchNotes: Georgia EPD licenses asbestos abatement contractor firms and publishes a dated informational roster. The source remains a manual handoff because the agency says the list is not regularly updated and current proof should be requested.
verificationCaveats: The published roster may be stale; request proof of the current EPD license before relying on a listed firm.
No matching record in the dated roster is not proof that a firm lacks a current license or that no other asbestos credential exists.
verificationNotes: No supported sync or verification adapter is exposed until snapshot discovery, PDF shape, current-status semantics, and publication terms are reviewed.
maintainerNotes: Always preserve the roster revision date and EPD stale-list warning. Do not present a roster row as a live license verification.

researchEvidence.note: Official EPD FAQ states that EPD licenses asbestos abatement contractor firms but does not license asbestos inspectors.
Official roster page links licensed asbestos abatement contractors and warns its lists are not updated regularly.
Official licensing guide states qualifying abatement work requires a Georgia-licensed asbestos abatement contractor and project notification.

blocker.summary: The only reviewed bulk path is an irregularly updated PDF that the agency says is not current proof; no stable machine contract or reuse position has been established.
